version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="vxlan-flow" name="VXLAN Traffic Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1226" dy="719" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="450" background="#1B1B1B" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="xx81nM8aK4Ttn0iCNmeh-82" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="265" width="1060" x="20" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#9933FF;strokeColor=#4C0099;fontSize=11;fontColor=#D5E8D4;fillStyle=solid;" value="<b>VM on Rack 1</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">VLAN 7 (Infra)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#B3B3B3;strokeColor=#333333;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1B1B1B;" value="<b>Leaf 1 (VTEP)</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">Wrap frame in VXLAN<br>VNI 10007 = VLAN 7</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="250" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#996185;align=center;" value="Original<br>Frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="180" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#996185;strokeWidth=2;" target="20" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#4D9900;strokeColor=#336600;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="520" x="290" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#009900;align=center;" value="<b>VXLAN Encapsulated Packet</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="220" x="435" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="42" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CCFF99;strokeColor=#66CC00;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1B1B1B;" value="Outer IP<br><font style="font-size:8px">Src: VTEP Leaf-1<br>Dst: VTEP Leaf-3</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="110" x="345" y="182.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="43" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CCFF99;strokeColor=#66CC00;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1B1B1B;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="UDP<br><font style="font-size:8px">Port 4789</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="70" x="465" y="182.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="44" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CCFF99;strokeColor=#66CC00;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1B1B1B;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="VXLAN Hdr<br><font style="font-size:8px"><b>VNI 10007</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="90" x="545" y="182.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CCFF99;strokeColor=#66CC00;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1B1B1B;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="Original<br>Ethernet Frame<br><font style="font-size:8px">(VM traffic)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="110" x="645" y="182.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1F7BFF;strokeColor=#000099;fontSize=11;fontColor=#D5E8D4;" value="<b>Spine</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">Routes encapsulated<br>packet (L3)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="475" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#B3B3B3;strokeColor=#333333;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1B1B1B;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<b>Leaf 3 (VTEP)</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">Unwrap VXLAN<br>VNI 10007 → VLAN 7</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="680" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="70" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#9933FF;strokeColor=#4C0099;fontSize=11;fontColor=#D5E8D4;fillStyle=solid;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;" value="<b>VM on Rack 3</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">VLAN 7 (Infra)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="920" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="75" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#996185;align=center;" value="Original<br>Frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="856" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=3;" target="50" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" edge="1" parent="1" source="50" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=3;" target="60" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" edge="1" parent="1" source="60" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#996185;strokeWidth=2;" target="70" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="80" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;align=center;fontColor=#666666;" value="<b>EVPN</b> (control plane) tells every switch where every MAC/IP lives" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="700" x="200" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="81" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="<font style="font-size:10px;color:#6c8ebf">WRAP</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="300" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="82" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="<font style="font-size:10px;color:#6c8ebf">UNWRAP</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="720" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
